cases.description: Verify review-control-catalog.json has schemaVersion === 2 at root
cases.evidence: skills/sdd-review/references/review-control-catalog.json root schemaVersion is 2.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Catalog loads at v2

cases.description: Verify review-control-catalog.json root has 'reviewer': 'sdd-review' field
cases.evidence: skills/sdd-review/references/review-control-catalog.json root reviewer is "sdd-review".
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Requirement: Canonical Review JSON Authority

cases.description: Verify review-control-catalog.json root has NO generatedHumanViewRef field
cases.evidence: Root key enumeration found no generatedHumanViewRef field in review-control-catalog.json.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Catalog loads at v2

cases.description: Verify review-control-catalog.json root has NO presentation field
cases.evidence: Root key enumeration found no presentation field in review-control-catalog.json.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Catalog loads at v2

cases.description: Verify review-control-catalog.json root has NO validation field
cases.evidence: Root key enumeration found no validation field in review-control-catalog.json.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Catalog loads at v2

cases.description: Verify review-control-catalog.json vocabulary has ONLY complies and severity keys (no safeEvidence, no forbiddenEvidence, no reviewer)
cases.evidence: review-control-catalog.json vocabulary keys are exactly complies and severity.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Vocabulary is minimal

cases.description: Verify no control entry in review-control-catalog.json carries a 'reviewer' field
cases.evidence: All 96 controls were enumerated; no control object contains a reviewer key.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Per-control reviewer field is absent

cases.description: Verify no control entry in review-control-catalog.json carries a 'notes' field with value exactly 'Not provided'
cases.evidence: All 96 controls were enumerated; no control object has notes equal to "Not provided".
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Blank notes are absent

cases.description: Verify review-control-catalog.json contains exactly 96 control entries
cases.evidence: review-control-catalog.json controls array length is 96.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: All controls are represented

cases.description: Verify review-report.schema.json required array contains exactly 14 fields in spec order: schemaName, schemaVersion, changeName, artifactKind, generatedAt, status, verdict, nextRecommended, totals, catalogRef, catalogSnapshotId, unavailableTooling, matrix, artifactMetadata
cases.evidence: review-report.schema.json required array exactly matches the 14-field v2 order.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Requirement: Review Report Artifact

cases.description: Verify review-report.schema.json does NOT contain any of the legacy fields: blockingSummary, evidenceSummary, runtimeChecks, inputsInspected, validation, changedFileSecurityHandoff, operationalEvidenceSummary
cases.evidence: Full schema text search found none of the listed legacy field names.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Legacy fields are rejected

cases.description: Verify review-report.schema.json $defs contains both 'ref' and 'stateArtifactRef' definitions
cases.evidence: review-report.schema.json $defs contains both ref and stateArtifactRef keys.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Requirement: Review Report Artifact — $defs

cases.description: Verify review-report.schema.json matrix items pattern matches REV-CORP-001 through REV-CORP-096
cases.evidence: matrixRow.properties.item.pattern is ^REV-CORP-(00[1-9]|0[1-8][0-9]|09[0-6])$.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: All controls are represented

cases.description: Verify review-report.schema.json matrixRow $def includes 'finding' field as free-text string (not enum)
cases.evidence: matrixRow.properties.finding is type string and has no enum constraint.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Finding column is populated

cases.description: Verify review-report.schema.json artifactMetadata.stateRegistration has minItems: 2
cases.evidence: artifactMetadata.properties.stateRegistration.minItems is 2.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: stateRegistration has two entries

cases.description: Verify review-report.schema.json root has additionalProperties: false
cases.evidence: review-report.schema.json root additionalProperties is false.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Requirement: Review Report Artifact — additionalProperties

cases.description: Verify review-report.schema.json all nested objects (totals, matrixRow, stateArtifactRef, ref, artifactMetadata) have additionalProperties: false
cases.evidence: review-report.schema.json root plus all object-type definitions have additionalProperties: false: totals, artifactMetadata, stateArtifactRef, and matrixRow. $defs.ref is a string schema ({ type: string, minLength: 1 }), so additionalProperties is inapplicable under JSON Schema 2020-12.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Requirement: Review Report Artifact — additionalProperties

cases.description: Verify report-template.md contains '## JSON Field Mapping' section with a table mapping all 14 v2 required fields and no legacy fields
cases.evidence: report-template.md ## JSON Field Mapping contains a 14-row table listing every required root field from review-report.schema.json with type and rendering destination, and no listed legacy fields.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Field mapping table is updated

cases.description: Verify report-template.md contains '## Required Structure' skeleton section showing full matrix spec
cases.evidence: report-template.md contains ## Required Structure and a matrix skeleton with the v2 column header.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Requirement: Report Template v2 Structure

cases.description: Verify report-template.md matrix table header columns are exactly: Item | Requirement | Standard | Category | Severity | Complies | Finding | Evidence Location | Notes
cases.evidence: report-template.md matrix header matches the required 9-column sequence exactly.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Matrix columns include Finding

cases.description: Verify report-template.md contains matrix join instruction: matrix[].item joined with catalog controls[].id
cases.evidence: report-template.md contains the exact rendering rule: Rendering rule: join `matrix[].item` with `catalog controls[].id` to get `Requirement`, `Standard`, `Category`, `Severity` columns.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Requirement: Report Template v2 Structure — Matrix Rules

cases.description: Verify report-template.md does NOT contain '## Matrix Validation' section
cases.evidence: Full template heading search found no ## Matrix Validation section.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Validation sections are absent

cases.description: Verify report-template.md does NOT contain '## Catalog Validation' section
cases.evidence: Full template heading search found no ## Catalog Validation section.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Validation sections are absent

cases.description: Verify report-template.md DOES contain '## Safe Evidence Rules' section with verbatim content from original lines 108–111
cases.evidence: report-template.md ## Safe Evidence Rules contains exactly the expected four bullet lines verbatim, including forbidden evidence classes, unavailable-tooling handling, and the Excel/Python/script/spreadsheet/workbook exclusion sentence.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Safe Evidence Rules are verbatim

cases.description: Verify report-template.md content before '## JSON Field Mapping' (lines 1–8) remains unchanged from v1
cases.evidence: The pre-field-mapping preamble before ## JSON Field Mapping is preserved unchanged in report-template.md.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Requirement: Report Template v2 Structure — pre-field-mapping content unchanged

cases.description: Verify the three reference files are internally coherent: catalog schemaVersion matches schema $comment reference; template matrix columns match schema matrixRow fields; template field-mapping table references exactly the 14 schema required fields
cases.evidence: Catalog schemaVersion is 2; schema requires exactly the same 14 root fields listed in the template mapping; template matrix presentation is coherent with schema matrixRow fields plus the explicit catalog join for Requirement, Standard, Category, and Severity.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: Reference artifacts are coherent

cases.description: Verify skills/sdd-review-security/ directory was NOT modified (no file changes in that path)
cases.evidence: git diff --name-only -- skills/sdd-review-security/ returned no paths.
cases.spec: sdd-review-workflow: Scenario: sdd-review-security is deferred

cases.description: Confirm all test runner, unit, integration, e2e, coverage, linter, type checker, and formatter tooling is unavailable — report as explicit unavailable-tooling evidence, not as passing checks
cases.evidence: openspec/config.yaml marks test_runner, unit, integration, e2e, coverage, linter, type_checker, and formatter as unavailable; no runtime/static tooling was treated as passing evidence.
cases.spec: openspec/config.yaml: testing.test_runner.available: false
